creator: js@jschneider.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #2)
CC: reig.simeo@gmail.com
Simeo Reig, as you are the maintainer of wildfly14, and this wildfly15 port is basically a copy of that, request that you take maintainership of this new port.  Could you also please take a look at the plist? I wasn't sure about some of the ownership and permissions settings, particularly with some new dirs and files.
